Let’s Make Your Party Epic

Ready to book lessons, DJ services, or a dance floor? Have questions about our packages? We’d love to hear from you!

Contact Information

  • Phone - (555) 123-4567
  • Email - info@danceontime.com
  • Studio Location - Madison, Georgia

Get In Touch

For Wedding Packages

Email us with:

  • Wedding date
  • Guest count
  • Which service(s) you’re interested in (instruction, DJ, floor, or all three)
  • Any specific requests or questions

For DJ Services

Let us know:

  • Event date and time
  • Venue location
  • Event type and guest count
  • Music preferences
  • Any special moments to coordinate

For Dance Floor Rental

Tell us:

  • Event date
  • Venue address (indoor/outdoor)
  • Preferred floor size
  • Any additional needs

Response Time

We typically respond to inquiries within 24 hours. For faster service, call us!

Studio Information

In-Studio Lesson Location

Madison, Georgia

  • Climate-controlled studio
  • Full-length mirrors
  • Professional audio system
  • Convenient parking

In-Home Lessons

We travel throughout Georgia for lessons. $50 travel fee applies.

Service Area

  • Primary: Georgia
  • Additional locations available—ask us!

Follow Us

Stay updated on special offers and event highlights:

  • Instagram - @danceontime
  • Facebook - Dance On Time
  • TikTok - @danceontime

Hours

Studio & Office Hours:

  • Monday - Friday: 10:00 AM - 8:00 PM
  • Saturday: 12:00 PM - 6:00 PM
  • Sunday: By appointment only

Event Services Available:

  • Evenings and weekends for events
  • Flexible scheduling for your celebration

Ready to dance? Reach out today to get started on planning your epic celebration!
